title: PM Lane 319 - Project Miner Temp Power Customer Delivery And Durable Proof Storage Plan Design No-Live Packet
authority_basis: Standing PM blocker authority and repo technical authority, used here to convert Lane 317 and Lane 318 into a future storage decision without admitting schema, persistence, or runtime delivery execution.
activation_condition: Lane 317 already defines the delivery/proof contract fields and validator rules.
Lane 318 already defines the PM-facing review surface for that contract.
No Temp Power customer delivery and durable proof storage-plan packet exists yet.
current_truth: Lane 315 remains the hosted-green runtime baseline, and it still blocks actual delivery execution inside the current customer-preview review slice.
Lane 317 defines what a future delivery/proof record must contain, while Lane 318 defines what a PM must be able to inspect before runtime admission is considered.

The next bounded design step is storage planning only: decide where a future delivery/proof review record would live, what adapter/readback needs it would impose, and which shortcuts stay explicitly rejected.
Schema admission, persistence, readback routes, and runtime delivery/proof execution remain separate later packets.
Finance/payroll/billing/invoice/accounting outputs and source writeback remain outside this lane.
allowed_actions: Define recommended future table, entity, route, column, and constraint decisions for customer delivery and durable proof review storage.
Document adapter and readback requirements for any later admitted implementation.
Keep storage planning design-only and no-live.
not_allowed: No product code, schema, route, UI implementation, or hosted action.
No persistence contract execution or live storage admission.
No live or local POST claiming customer delivery or proof recording occurred.
No finance, payroll, billing, invoice, accounting, external finance sync, or source writeback work.
No auth, ingress, DNS, or secret changes.
validation: Decision label, selected outcome, recommended storage decisions, rejected unsafe storage options, and blocked-domain boundaries are present across touched lane 319 files
Canonical PM docs/status route the next follow-on step through readback design rather than schema or runtime delivery admission
git diff --check passes for touched lane 319 and canonical PM doc surfaces
validation_result: PASS: lane 319 defines the future delivery/proof storage plan and keeps schema, runtime delivery, finance, and source-writeback widening deferred.
